about.first: My approach is autonomous and passionate in everything I do. I have a great ability to take responsibility for projects and adapt easily to different environments.
about.second: I always face challenges with a positive attitude and am constantly seeking challenges that drive me. I crave to surround myself with people who share the same ambition for continuous improvement.

first.title: INNOVATIVE
first.description: Passionate about the latest trends in the world of web development and applying them creatively in innovative projects.

second.title: PASSIONATE
second.description: Passionate about web development and problem-solving. Constantly seeking technical challenges to learn and grow.

third.title: ENGAGED
third.description: Focused and dedicated to achieving goals, delivering quality solutions, and overcoming challenges with determination.

four.title: AI-DRIVEN
four.description: I integrate artificial intelligence agents into my workflow, designing custom skills and automations to boost productivity and code quality.

five.title: SCALABLE ARCHITECTURE
five.description: I design multi-tenant systems, microservices, and SaaS platforms with circuit breakers, caching, and high availability patterns.

features.title: Reasons to hire my services
features.subtitle: I offer exceptional and customized digital solutions that not only meet standards, but also exceed expectations.

first.title: Performance
first.description: I develop high-performance web applications, optimizing each line of code to ensure a smooth and fast experience for users.

third.description: I employ agile methodologies and advanced tools to ensure efficient development, meeting deadlines, and delivering high-quality results.

four.title: Immovation

six.description: I implement robust and proactive security measures in my projects to protect user information and ensure data integrity.

timeline.title: My Journey
timeline.subtitle: A timeline of projects and roles that have shaped my career.

myPay.desc: Sole developer of the payment middleware for Regione Lombardia. Orchestrated 40+ SOAP operations, designed OAuth2/JWT authentication, and implemented circuit breaker patterns.

petFarmacy.desc: Architected and built a multi-tenant SaaS veterinary platform with subscription management, WhatsApp notifications, and a mobile companion app.

food4You.desc: Built a cross-platform food delivery app with real-time order tracking using WebSockets and role-based experiences.

beachGo.desc: Developed a beach management app with interactive maps, drag-and-drop reservations, and seasonal booking system.

control.desc: Built a comprehensive business management ecosystem solo (1,100+ commits). Monolithic Spring Boot backend with Angular dashboard.

europCar.desc: Developed a vehicle rental management system with fleet tracking and reservation scheduling on Oracle database.

ecommerce.desc: Built a full-stack e-commerce platform on AWS with Spring Boot, React, Stripe payments, and PostgreSQL.

freelance.desc: Started my career as a freelance web developer, building MERN stack applications and learning enterprise Java.

aiAgents.title: AI & Agent Engineering
aiAgents.subtitle: I don't just use AI — I engineer it. Custom agents, skills, and workflows.

promptEngineering.0: Design structured prompts with defined workflows, decision trees, and output formats
promptEngineering.1: Create multi-step agent chains that analyze, plan, implement, and verify autonomously
promptEngineering.2: Optimize token usage and context windows for efficient agent conversations

customSkills.0: Build 20+ custom agent skills for specialized tasks (SEO, a11y, diagnostics, PRDs)
customSkills.1: Version-lock external skills with SHA-256 hashes for deterministic behavior
customSkills.2: Design composable skill architectures with progressive disclosure patterns

integrations.0: Integrate multiple AI providers (Claude, GPT, DeepSeek) into unified workflows
integrations.1: Connect agent skills with project tooling: issue trackers, PRDs, CI/CD pipelines
integrations.2: Build agent-oriented documentation (AGENTS.md) that serves both humans and AI
